attributes.description: Alerts when active sessions exceed 500. Possible connection pool misconfiguration.
attributes.name: [MongoDB OTel] High session count

investigation_guide.blob:
## MongoDB high session count

### What fired
Session count exceeded 500 during the window.

### Why it matters
MongoDB opens a logical session per unique driver session. Sustained high counts usually indicate short-lived client sessions without reuse or driver misconfigurations.

### Triage
1. Inspect client driver versions and settings.

### Remediation
- Enable session caching / reuse.

### Tuning
- 500 threshold; tune to driver load.
